Part One

Creative Strategy

A comprehensive brand and campaign strategy for Al Biraa Clinic's Botox Treatment launch in Dubai's luxury aesthetic market.

Campaign Objective
To position Al Biraa Clinic as one of Dubai's most trusted luxury aesthetic clinics for natural Botox treatments, attracting affluent clients who value expertise, discretion, and premium patient care.
01
Target Audience
Who We Are Speaking To
Primary Audience

Affluent Women · 32–52

  • Professionals, entrepreneurs, homemakers & socialites
  • Palm Jumeirah, Downtown, DIFC, Dubai Marina, Emirates Hills, Jumeirah
  • Household income above AED 40,000/month
  • Active on Instagram — beauty, wellness & luxury lifestyle
Secondary Audience

High-Income Men · 35–55

  • Business executives, entrepreneurs & public-facing professionals
  • Seeking discreet, natural-looking facial rejuvenation
  • Value privacy, premium service & trusted medical professionals
02
Customer Pain Points
What Keeps Them Searching
  • Fear of looking frozen or overdone after Botox
  • Difficulty finding a qualified, experienced injector
  • Previous negative experiences with low-cost clinics
  • Forehead lines, crow's feet & visible ageing signs
  • Privacy and confidentiality during treatment
  • Worries about pain, downtime, and recovery
03
Customer Desires
What They Truly Want
  • Natural, refreshed results — not transformation
  • An experienced physician they can fully trust
  • Personalised treatment plans tailored to them
  • A luxurious, discreet clinic environment
  • Minimal downtime with maximum confidence
  • Premium-quality Botox products and expert aftercare
04
Tone of Voice
Quiet Confidence

Rather than aggressive sales language, our communication focuses on expertise, confidence, and natural beauty — reassuring without being clinical.

Sophisticated Professional Reassuring Trustworthy Elegant Aspirational
05
Content Angle
"The Art of Subtlety"

Botox positioned as a refined enhancement, not a cosmetic transformation. Key message: "Refresh your look while preserving your natural expression."

  • Natural-looking Botox results
  • Educational posts addressing common myths
  • Before-and-after transformations
  • Patient testimonials & physician expertise
  • Luxury clinic experience content
06
Luxury Positioning
Al Biraa Clinic — A Premium Destination
🎨
Minimalist visual design with ivory, champagne, olive & charcoal palette
📷
Elegant editorial-style photography — Vogue Arabia aesthetic
🔤
Professional serif typography for premium brand identity
🚪
Private consultation rooms with confidential, personalised care
07
Competitive Differentiation
Why Clients Choose Al Biraa Clinic

Unlike clinics that focus on volume and promotions, Al Biraa Clinic focuses on quality, trust, and personalised care.

👨‍⚕️
Physician-administered Botox treatments
🌍
Internationally trained aesthetic professionals
✅
EU-approved Allergan Botox products only
🔁
Complimentary follow-up after every treatment

"At Al Biraa Clinic, we believe true beauty lies in refinement, not transformation. Every treatment is carefully tailored to enhance your natural features while preserving your individuality. Through expert care, premium products, and a discreet luxury experience, we help our clients look refreshed, confident, and effortlessly natural."

Part Two

Graphic Design & AI Content

Option A — Premium Instagram Feed Post · 1080 × 1350 px · Luxury Minimalist Aesthetic

Al Biraa Clinic
Dubai · Aesthetic Clinic
Instagram Post · 1080×1350px
Instagram Feed Post · 1080 × 1350 px
Creative Objective
Position Al Biraa as Dubai's Premier Luxury Botox Clinic
The design follows a luxury, minimalist style with elegant typography, a premium neutral colour palette, and a strong call-to-action — targeting affluent men and women seeking natural facial rejuvenation.
Software Used
AI-Powered Design Workflow
Google Gemini AI Canva (Free) ChatGPT
Google Gemini generated the hero portrait. Canva handled layout, typography, branding & export. ChatGPT refined creative strategy and ad copy.
AI Image Prompt Used
Primary Prompt — Google Gemini AI
Close-up portrait of an elegant Middle Eastern woman aged 35–48, eyes gently closed, serene and confident expression, natural glowing skin with visible texture, soft rim lighting from above left, warm ivory and cream background, face centered lower in frame leaving negative space at the top, editorial beauty photography, photorealistic DSLR shot, Vogue Arabia style, 85mm lens, subtle depth of field, champagne warm tones, no heavy makeup, authentic refined beauty.Negative: No airbrushing, plastic skin, beauty filters, heavy retouching, stock photo appearance, fake smile, overly symmetrical face.
Design Elements
Visual & Branding Decisions
  • Ivory & champagne background for warmth and luxury
  • Cormorant Garamond serif for premium brand typography
  • Olive/charcoal CTA button for contrast and action
  • No copyrighted images — 100% original AI-generated
  • Negative space at top for Instagram Stories crop safety
Part Three

Copywriting

Meta Ad copy crafted with a luxury tone — emotional hook, clear benefits, and a high-intent call-to-action.

Primary Text · Max 125 Words
≈ 89 words used
Confidence is timeless.
Your reflection should feel the same.
At Al Biraa Clinic, we believe the finest aesthetic treatments are the ones that look effortless. Our physician-administered Botox is tailored to soften the appearance of fine lines while preserving your natural expressions.

Enjoy a private consultation, personalised treatment plan, and expert care in a refined, luxurious environment.

Because true beauty isn't about looking different — it's about looking refreshed, confident, and naturally you.

Book your private consultation today and discover the art of subtle rejuvenation.
Book Now — Reserve Your Consultation
Headline · Max 40 Characters
Natural Botox. Dubai's Finest.
30 characters used40 max
Description · Max 30 Characters
Look refreshed. Feel yourself.
29 characters used30 max
CTA Button Selected
✓ Book Now
Botox is a high-intent service. Most prospects are already ready to schedule a consultation. "Book Now" matches the clinic's premium image, encourages immediate action, and makes the process simple — driving qualified leads directly to a booking experience.
Copy Architecture
HOOK
Emotional opening — speaks directly to self-confidence
TRUST
Physician-administered, personalised, private consultation
BENEFIT
Natural results, luxury environment, expert aftercare
CTA
Direct action with urgency and premium framing
Part Four

Meta Campaign Strategy

AED 15,000 · 30-Day Campaign · Lead Generation Objective for Botox Consultation Bookings

Considered
Traffic
Drives clicks but no intent signal — unsuitable for high-value bookings
Campaign Objective
Leads
Collects qualified leads directly through Meta Instant Forms or the clinic's booking page. Optimises for consultation intent — ideal for Botox's high-value, high-intent audience.
Considered
Conversions
Suitable after pixel accumulates 50+ events — better for scaling phase

Budget Allocation

AED 15,000 · 30-Day Phased Strategy

Week 1
Testing
AED 300/day — Validate Creatives & Audiences
AED 2,100
Weeks 2–3
Scaling
AED 550/day — Scale Winning Ad Sets
AED 7,700
Week 4
Retargeting
AED 600/day — Retargeting + LAL Push
AED 4,200
Scaling Rule: Ad sets achieving Cost per Lead below AED 100 will have budget increased by 20% every 3 days to maximise results from top-performing audiences.
Total Campaign Budget
AED 15,000
30 Days · Lead Generation
Testing Phase
AED 3,000
Scaling Phase
AED 9,000
Retargeting
AED 3,000
KPI Targets

Performance Benchmarks — Dubai Premium Market

CTR
2–3%
Strong engagement for premium aesthetic ads in Dubai's affluent feed environment
CPM
AED 35–60
Higher than regional average (AED 20–30) due to premium luxury audience targeting
CPC
AED 5–12
Competitive for Dubai's beauty and aesthetics industry with qualified intent
Cost per Lead
AED 80–150
Justified — Botox consultations convert at AED 1,500–5,000+ per treatment (strong LTV). Even 1 booking covers ~10× the lead cost.
Lead → Consultation
15–25%
Expected percentage of qualified leads proceeding to a booked consultation
ROAS
4x–6x
1 booked client from ~8 leads covers the full campaign cost. Premium treatments yield exceptional customer lifetime value.
📊
Meta Pixel
Installed on booking confirmation page to track completed consultations and optimise delivery toward high-intent users.
📋
Meta Instant Form
Mobile-optimised native lead form for frictionless submission — name, phone & preferred treatment pre-populated.
🔗
CRM Integration
Leads connected to clinic CRM or Google Sheets for immediate follow-up and conversion tracking throughout the funnel.
